name: Glambox Kitchen
tagline: Custom light meals, crafted with care and flavour

hero.headline: Meals that feel good and taste beautiful
hero.subheadline: Build a light meal your way — from bread to topping — or choose a preset crafted by our kitchen team.

about.headline: About Glambox Kitchen
about.body: Glambox Kitchen is a calm, bright space for light meals that energise without weighing you down. Choose from curated presets or customise every element to suit your taste, dietary needs, and rhythm of the day.

highlights.title: Light sandwiches
highlights.body: Build on your choice of bread with balanced fillings and crisp toppings.

highlights.title: Bagels & croissants
highlights.body: Soft, warm bakes paired with savoury or sweet combinations.

highlights.title: Preset meals
highlights.body: Chef-crafted options when you want an easy, beautiful choice.

services.headline: Light meal menu
services.body: Fresh sandwiches, bagels, and croissants you can personalise.

relatedConsultants.headline: Available chefs
relatedConsultants.body: Choose a chef to prepare your meal.
relatedConsultants.emptyMessage: Chef availability changes through the day.

services.title: Garden Chicken Sandwich
services.description: Light chicken, citrus dressing, mixed greens, and herbs.

details.longDescription: A fresh, balanced sandwich with herb chicken, crunchy greens, and a citrus finish.
prepSteps: Choose your bread and toppings.
Confirm any allergies or preferences.
aftercareSteps: Enjoy fresh within 30 minutes.
Ask for a takeaway box if needed.

services.title: Smoked Salmon Bagel
services.description: Creamy spread, cucumber, capers, and lemon zest.

details.longDescription: A light, silky bagel with smoked salmon and bright citrus notes.
prepSteps: Select your spread and topping blend.
Tell us if you prefer extra crunch.
aftercareSteps: Enjoy immediately for best texture.

services.title: Avocado Croissant
services.description: Buttery croissant, smashed avocado, and chilli flakes.

details.longDescription: A warm croissant with creamy avocado and a gentle kick of spice.
prepSteps: Choose your toppings and spice level.
aftercareSteps: Best enjoyed warm and fresh.

services.title: Protein Power Bowl
services.description: Grilled protein, grains, and seasonal vegetables. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R140.

details.longDescription: A high-protein balanced bowl with complex carbs and fresh greens, designed for sustained energy and recovery.
prepSteps: Arrive 10 minutes early for a smooth check-in.
Share any sensitivities or preferences before treatment begins.

consultants.headline: Kitchen chefs
consultants.body: Meet the chefs crafting your light meals.

relatedServices.headline: Meals by this chef
relatedServices.body: Choose a meal this chef prepares.

consultants.name: Harper Moyo
consultants.bio: Balances flavour with light, nourishing ingredients.
consultants.extendedBio: Harper designs balanced sandwiches with bright, clean flavours and thoughtful textures.

consultants.name: Amelia Brooks
consultants.bio: Known for fresh bagel builds with crisp toppings.
consultants.extendedBio: Amelia crafts bagels with clean lines, bright flavours, and a refined finish.

consultants.name: Theo Bennett
consultants.bio: Specialises in warm, flaky bakes with light fillings.
consultants.extendedBio: Theo creates croissant builds that feel indulgent yet light.

booking.headline: Build your meal

steps.title: Confirm your order

widget.headline: Finalise your order

widget.confirmationBody: Your meal will be prepared fresh.
widget.missingSelection: Select a date and time to confirm.

builder.headline: Custom meal builder

builder.confirmationBody: We are preparing your custom order now.
